reference: I have been very ill lately. I have asthmatic bronchitis with fluid on the lungs and have been vomiting clear fluid. I am on steroids, but lately I have noticed a heavy sensation in my legs from mid-thigh to my feet. For the past two days, it feels like warm bath water going down my legs when I stand up and walk around. There is no burning; it actually feels nice, but I am afraid something more is happening. It is a very noticeable feeling, like it stops me from what I am doing.
text: I have been very ill lately; I have asthmatic bronchitis with fluid on the lungs and have been vomiting clear fluid. I am on steroids, but lately I have noticed a heavy sensation in my legs from mid-thigh to my feet. For the past 2 days it feels like warm bathwater going down my legs when I stand up and walk around. There is no burning; it actually feels nice, but I am afraid something more is happening. It is a very noticeable feeling, like it stops me from what I am doing.
